ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Machine learning algorithm used (e.g., Random Forest, XGBoost) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the dataset */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset in bytes */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hyperparameters" (
  "hyperparameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hyperparameter */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the hyperparameter belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the hyperparameter (e.g., learning rate, max depth) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the hyperparameter */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the hyperparameter (e.g., integer, float, string) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hyperparameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hyperparameters_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the performance metric belongs to */,
  "cv_score" REAL /* Cross-validation score */,
  "holdout_score" REAL /* Holdout score */,
  "holdout_roc_auc_score" REAL /* Area Under the Receiver Operating Characteristic Curve (ROC AUC) score */,
  "training_time" REAL /* Training time in seconds */,
  "evaluation_time" REAL /* Evaluation time in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_dataset" (
  "model_dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model-dataset relationship */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "split_ratio" REAL /* Split ratio for training and testing (e.g., 0.8 for 80% training data) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_dataset_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_dataset_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_ownership" (
  "model_ownership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model-ownership relationship */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "ownership_type" TEXT /* Type of ownership (e.g., owner, collaborator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_ownership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_ownership_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_ownership_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the comment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_comments_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the version belongs to */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "version_hyperparameters" (
  "version_hyperparameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version-hyperparameter relationship */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version */,
  "hyperparameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hyperparameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_hyperparameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_hyperparameters_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_hyperparameters_hyperparameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("hyperparameter_id") REFERENCES hyperparameters ("hyperparameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "version_performance" (
  "version_performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version-performance relationship */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version */,
  "cv_score" REAL /* Cross-validation score */,
  "holdout_score" REAL /* Holdout score */,
  "holdout_roc_auc_score" REAL /* Area Under the Receiver Operating Characteristic Curve (ROC AUC) score */,
  "training_time" REAL /* Training time in seconds */,
  "evaluation_time" REAL /* Evaluation time in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_performance_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pipeline" (
  "pipeline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pipeline */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the pipeline belongs to */,
  "pipeline" TEXT /* Pipeline used for the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the pipeline was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pipeline_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pipeline_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feature_importance" (
  "feature_importance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature importance */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the feature importance belongs to */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "importance" REAL /* Importance of the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_importance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_importance_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "confusion_matrix" (
  "confusion_matrix_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each confusion matrix */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the confusion matrix belongs to */,
  "tp" INTEGER /* True positives */,
  "tn" INTEGER /* True negatives */,
  "fp" INTEGER /* False positives */,
  "fn" INTEGER /* False negatives */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("confusion_matrix_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_confusion_matrix_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
